_comment: Single source of truth for the NER entity-class wire names shared by the Rust enforcement plane (sng_dlp::ml_classifier::EntityClass) and the Go control plane (internal/service/dlp endpointEntityClasses / validEntityClassCSV). 'classes' is in ONNX model output-column order (columns 1..=6; column 0 is the implicit non-entity 'O'). Adding, removing, or renaming a class requires editing this file AND both implementations: the Rust parity test (crates/sng-dlp/tests/ml_classifier.rs) and the Go parity test (internal/service/dlp/entity_classes_parity_test.go) each fail otherwise, closing the manual-sync gap.
